global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with various graphic elements and text promoting a travel sale.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for travel bookings.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears abstract, possibly a shape or icon, with a soft outline.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element, likely a different shape or icon, with a contrasting color to the background.

elements.label: Abstract shape
elements.description: An abstract shape positioned centrally, featuring a smooth, rounded design.

elements.label: Overlay graphic
elements.description: An overlay graphic that complements the central elements, possibly with a subtle texture.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located at the bottom, possibly a dot or icon.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, similar in size and style to the previous one.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A third small decorative element, maintaining the same visual theme as the others.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A bold text element at the bottom, stating 'Book your next trip Special fares today' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Promotional headline
elements.description: A prominent headline at the top, reading 'RouteBloom SALE' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A price display at the bottom, showing '€29.99' in a bold font, emphasizing the cost.
